title: Feature Revision Schema
description: Schema for defining a revision of a feature, containing functional-level analysis of changes to be implemented

revision-id.description: Unique identifier for the revision. Use naming convention: <feature-id>-rev-<revision-number>

feature-id.description: Reference to the parent feature this revision belongs to

revision-number.description: Sequential number of this revision (starting at 1 for initial revision)

title.description: Short, descriptive title of the revision

description.description: Functional-level description of what needs to change when implementing this revision

rationale.description: Explanation of why this revision is needed

functional-changes.description: List of functional changes to be implemented in this revision

acceptance-criteria.description: High-level acceptance criteria for the revision

dependencies.description: Other revision IDs that this revision depends on

generated-by.description: Information about the LLM model that generated this revision

model.description: Name or identifier of the LLM model

generation-date.description: Timestamp when the revision was generated

created-by.description: Person or system that created this revision

created-at.description: Timestamp when the revision was created

updated-at.description: Timestamp when the revision was last updated

tags.description: Key-value pairs for categorizing or filtering revisions

notes.description: Additional notes or comments about the revision
